## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] British spelling, no em-dashes or en-dashes, no assistant attribution
- [ ] README roadmap or CHANGELOG updated if relevant
